heading: Before You Begin
body:
To utilize the sample data that MongoDB provides, you must first create a
deployment to load data into. To create a self-managed local deployment, see
[Run-time Database Configuration for Self-Managed Deployments](manual/administration/configuration).

To load sample data, you must also have a minimum of
[readWrite](manual/reference/built-in-roles) access to the deployment. For more information on user
administration, see [Manage Users and Roles on Self-Managed Deployments](manual/tutorial/manage-users-and-roles).
